task.title: Handle `~~~` and arbitrary length code fences

rating.rationale: Agent correctly identified the root cause (backtick-only regex), proposed a solid line-by-line parser respecting CommonMark fence rules (same char, length comparison, no info string on closer), and included thorough tests covering tildes, long fences, nesting, and cross-character mismatch. Dinged slightly on code quality because the closing-fence check uses chars().all() + chars().next().unwrap() which is slightly fragile — extracting the fence char once would be cleaner — but overall this is a clean, well-communicated, autonomous solution.
